message:
fix: warn when workspace lookup fails during sling rollback bead unhook (gt-eikjsv)

- Add warning log when FindFromCwdOrError fails in rollbackSlingArtifacts,
  preventing silent skip of bead unhook that could leave zombie beads
- Remove misleading convoy from rollback comment since rollback does not
  clean up auto-convoys

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
